items.name: mentor
items.description: mentor — a session-insights skill for AI coding agents. This skill reads your local Claude Code and OpenAI Codex history and writes an /insights-style HTML report on how you work: what you build, where you lose time, and concrete fixes. An agent skill for Claude Code, Codex, and any skills-capable agent.
